title: Dai's Codex
description: A modpack that put's a heavy emphasis on the vanilla experience with no shaders. It adds small visual changes that impacts the overall visual experience and atmosphere.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/_4RGB2V8_XE" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**About The Modpack**

Inspired by the Hermitcraft series and it's visual experience. This mod creates a vanilla look and experience without any shaders. The mod strictly uses fogs, distance, and clouds and small skybox changes to add to the vanilla experience.

This mod also includes Axiom and other creative building tools to help aid players be more efficient with drafting a build for their survival world.

More mods are currently being experimented on to help improve this vanilla experience.
Examples of visual appearance shown in the video provided above.
